# harvester_kubeovn_provider_network (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "harvester_kubeovn_provider_network" "example" {
  name              = "example-provider-net"
  default_interface = "eth0"

  custom_interfaces {
    interface_name = "eth1"
    nodes          = ["node1", "node2"]
  }

  exclude_nodes      = ["node3"]
  exchange_link_name = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `default_interface` (String)
- `name` (String) A unique name

### Optional

- `custom_interfaces` (Block List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--custom_interfaces))
- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `exchange_link_name` (Boolean)
- `exclude_nodes` (List of String)
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `tags` (Map of String)
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `message` (String)
- `state` (String)
- `status_not_ready_nodes` (List of String)
- `status_ready` (Boolean)
- `status_ready_nodes` (List of String)
- `status_vlans` (List of String)
